title: Creamy Millet Pilaf with Poached Egg
description: A delicious and comforting Indian-inspired millet pilaf dish topped with a poached egg and gooey cheese.
instructions: Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion and ginger; cook until onion is translucent.
Add millet and stir to coat with oil mixture.
Add water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until water is absorbed.
Top with crumbled goat cheese and a poached egg.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
